education.degree: Scrum Master Accredited Certification (International Scrum Institute).

projects: Project2: Automation of widgets (36 widgets in total) in the FORTRESS to lower the time taken by TRMS (Transaction Risk Management System) in solving fraudulent transactions. The key objective of this project was to increase the productivity of the TRMS team by 15% and lower the time taken per investigation to three minutes.
Gathered business requirements by participating in JAD sessions, interviewing business users and stakeholders, conducting one to one sessions and consulting existing systems documents.
Conducted Interviews with project managers, SME’s, business users to collect requirement and business process information.
Assisted PM in creating Work Breakdown Structure and Project charter using MS project.
certifications: Scrum Master Accredited Certification (International Scrum Institute).
